title: Login Issue
description: Customer is unable to login to their account using valid credentials, and receives an unexpected error message every time they attempt to sign in to the platform.

title: Payment Failure
description: Customer reports that payment transactions fail repeatedly when attempting to pay via credit card, despite sufficient balance and valid card details, causing frustration and delay.

title: Account Update Request
description: Customer requests to update personal account information including email address, phone number, and billing details but is unable to do so from the profile settings page.

title: Bug in Dashboard
description: Customer reports that the graph chart on the dashboard page does not load properly, and sometimes shows blank or incorrect data when accessed from the analytics section.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer has requested a dark mode feature to be added to the application interface to reduce eye strain during night usage and improve overall usability.

title: Unable to Upload File
description: Customer reports that the file upload button on the profile page is unresponsive, and attempts to attach documents fail multiple times across different browsers and devices.

title: Email Notification Delay
description: Customer notices significant delays in receiving email notifications from the system, including alerts for orders, messages, and updates, which affects timely responses and workflow.

title: Password Reset Link Broken
description: Customer reports that the password reset link sent via email does not redirect correctly, preventing them from resetting their password and accessing their account temporarily.

title: App Crash on iOS
description: Customer experiences immediate crashes when opening the app on iOS 16 devices, making it impossible to use key features such as messaging, payments, and profile management.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: Customer was billed twice for the same order, and the invoice shows incorrect amounts, leading to confusion and requests for urgent refund or correction of the billing error.

title: Profile Picture Not Updating
description: Customer reports that after uploading a new profile picture, the image does not update or display correctly on the platform, even after clearing cache and refreshing the page.

title: Refund Request
description: Customer has requested a refund for order #12345 due to receiving a defective product, and is seeking confirmation on processing time and the refund method available.
